title: ~Another Euphoria~
overview: Miracle is an aspiring artist at ADEN Academy working to fulfill her dream of being like Kizuna AI. Today she takes the first step on her road to virtual stardom...

title: ~Encounter Attraction~
overview: Miracle's dream to become like Kizuna AI will lead her to her more adventurous side and in a sweet dream, she'll discover something, which will put her on the long-awaited path

title: ~First Step Towards the Stage~
overview: Our main heroine must win over and placed herself on the top 15 of the Virtual Grid Award.  The Group is forming up with a total of 2 new characters on scene.

title: ~Andante of Confusion~
overview: After being rebuked for not speaking smooth enough, Miracle starts to work harder to become more well recognized among her peers. With the help of her new friends Chris and Marumaru, she tries to win another personal improvement victory.

title: ~The Color of a Word~
overview: A frustrated Noelle takes Miracle under her wing and shows her the power of interpreting words.

title: ~The Reason for Perfection~
overview: Noelle has taught Miracle a special ability , and thanks for her advice, our young singing virtual artist is climbing in the ranks. As a "thank you", Miracle offered to help her again write music lyrics, but she sadly refuses, 'cause of her own demons of the past.

title: ~Battlefield of Conflict~
overview: Problem arises for the new established team, and know they seek a way to get to the bottom of it.

title: ~Teatime of Anguish~
overview: Fate has again stepped in, in opportunity has been giving for Miracle to prove herself. Will she be able to claim up in the ranks!?

title: ~Unpredictable Ultimate~
overview: The "Ultimate" cases is once again on the table. Who will become no. 1 in the rankings of ADEN Academy in the special race, included in XR Technologies course.

title: ~What It Means to Be Me~
overview: As everyone else's rankings rise and Miracle gets left behind, she finds herself wondering if she's cut out to be an idol at all.

title: ~True Color~
overview: Quan works up the courage to reveal her true self after a failed outing at a music festival.

title: ~Stage of Fate~
overview: Miracle and her friends form a new unit with the aim of making it to the prestigious Virtual Grid Awards and winning the coveted Lapin d'Or.

title: ~Prelude to Harsh Battle~
overview: With their success in the qualifiers, PathTLive is ready to prep for the upcoming main event! But while Miracle's celebrating, Quan is getting more and more worried...

title: ~Departure of Resolution~
overview: Quan has been given an offer to join BRT5, the hottest group around. If she chooses to go, will Miracle find the strength to support her friend?

title: ~A Seil Just For Me~
overview: Miracle, Chris, Noelle and Riz have come together to watch a BRT5 stream. To their surprise, Quan was unveiled as a new member of BRT5. Miracle, who had taken it for granted that PathTLive would complete in the ADEN seed finals as a unit, could not hide her upset. Seperately, Chris was dealing with her own complex feelings. In the midst of their gloominess, Miracle receives a message from an unexpected source. Miracle is invited to a specific place and invites Chris to follow her.

title: ～Answer～
overview: Quan has mixed feelings about Noelle joining BRT5. Noelle, who grew up in an elite family, had overcome her complex towards her own family through her involvement with Miracle……or so she thought. However, influenced by Quan, Noelle is struck once again by the complex that she was sure she had overcome. Riz contacts her, noticing that something is off. Where does Riz take Noelle..?! Meanwhile, Quan feels refreshed, but ends up watching Miracle and Niska’s live collaboration.

title: ~One-Sided Rivalry~
overview: As the competition gets closer, Miracle joins a special XR tag game with the singers from the other groups. If you get tagged, you turn into a banana!

title: ~New Feelings~
overview: After a failed attempt to go around the culture festival with Chris, Sofia challenges Riz to an XR game. Will Riz learn to face to up to the new emotions within her?

title: ~Where Flapping Wings Fly~
overview: With time running out before the main event, Miracle thinks about what it is she truly wants to do, and who she really wants to perform with.

title: ~Shoes of Friendship~
overview: The main event has begun, and first up to perform is VICONIC. Can polar opposites Jua and Thea work together to make a hit performance?
